title: Robin Boards the Sea Train
description: The crew turns to Kokoro, Chimney, Gonbe, and the runaway train Rocketman to chase the Sea Train through Aqua Laguna.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Iceburg, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. The crew turns to Kokoro, Chimney, Gonbe, and the runaway train Rocketman to chase the Sea Train through Aqua Laguna.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Iceburg- San... you have a visitor...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NMA... What's with your unusual appearance...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Shut up!! My body had become useless.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't help out the govern- ment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're the guys who killed Tom-San!!!

summary: The crew turns to Kokoro, Chimney, Gonbe, and the runaway train Rocketman to chase the Sea Train through Aqua Laguna.
